flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at MGH Institute of Health Professions fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (190 → 164).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at MGH Institute of Health Professions are 6% below 6-year earnings ($93.2k → $87.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at MGH Institute of Health Professions fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
